languages.text: Предмет утратил прежнюю достоверность, обнажив истинную природу реплики.

traits.locale_text: Предмет утратил прежнюю достоверность, обнажив истинную природу реплики.

languages.text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.
languages.original_text: Предмет утратил прежнюю достоверность, обнажив истинную природу реплики.

traits.locale_text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.
The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.
The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.

languages.text: Das Exponat hat seine einstige Authentizität verloren und offenbart nun die wahre Natur der Replik.
languages.original_text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.

traits.locale_text: Das Exponat hat seine einstige Authentizität verloren und offenbart nun die wahre Natur der Replik.

languages.text: 这个物件已经失去了原有的真实感，暴露出仿制品的本来面目。
languages.original_text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.

traits.locale_text: 这个物件已经失去了原有的真实感，暴露出仿制品的本来面目。

languages.text: Le sujet a perdu de son authenticité première, révélant sa véritable nature : ce n'est qu'une copie.
languages.original_text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.

traits.locale_text: Le sujet a perdu de son authenticité première, révélant sa véritable nature : ce n'est qu'une copie.

languages.text: La pieza ha perdido su autenticidad, revelando la verdadera naturaleza de la réplica.
languages.original_text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.

traits.locale_text: La pieza ha perdido su autenticidad, revelando la verdadera naturaleza de la réplica.

languages.text: Özne, eski özgünlüğünü kaybederek kopyanın gerçek doğasını ortaya çıkardı.
languages.original_text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.

traits.locale_text: Özne, eski özgünlüğünü kaybederek kopyanın gerçek doğasını ortaya çıkardı.

languages.text: その主題は、かつての真実に触れられなくなった。その真偽は、模倣品の本質を露わにした。
languages.original_text: The subject has lost its former authenticity, exposing the true nature of the replica.

traits.locale_text: その主題は、かつての真実に触れられなくなった。その真偽は、模倣品の本質を露わにした。
